description_long: This object is a stylized doll with a simplified human face and straight, medium-length brown hair. The head is positioned at the intersection of two large, angular, and glossy geometric forms that extend outward, resembling abstract wings or a cape. The body is not distinctly visible, as the geometric shapes dominate the structure, giving the doll a unique, almost sculptural appearance. The surfaces are smooth and highly reflective, with a color palette dominated by dark browns and blacks, accented by the lighter skin tone of the face. The doll's facial features are minimalistic, with a neutral expression and straight-cut bangs. The overall design suggests a modern, abstract interpretation of a doll, possibly intended as an art piece or a decorative urban toy.
description: A stylized doll with a minimalistic face and straight brown hair, set within large, glossy, angular geometric forms in dark brown and black. The design is abstract and sculptural, with smooth, reflective surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face with straight brown hair, positioned at the intersection of two large, glossy, angular shapes.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thinness of the geometric forms and the profile of the doll's head, with the face partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the doll's head and the converging angular shapes, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the elongated, sharp-edged geometric forms and a partial profile of the doll's head.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll's body is abstracted into large, angular, glossy geometric forms in dark brown and black, with no discernible garments or patterns.
attribute_pose: The head is upright and centered at the intersection of two large, angular forms; no arms or legs are visible, and the torso is abstracted into the geometric structure.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with straight mouth, relaxed eyes, and no visible emotion.
attribute_hair_style: Straight, medium-length brown hair with blunt bangs covering the forehead.
